subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-03-10
subcodes.first_line: Today whosoever has arisen to teach the Cause and serve the believers, divine confirmations shall descend upon him; otherwise he is wasting his time.
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
